allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
BACKUP POINT: Foundation for unified account system

This commit represents a stable backup before implementing the unified
account system where one user can have multiple professional profiles
and owned places.

## Changes Made:
✅ Added date fields to Workplace \(startDate, endDate, isCurrent\)
✅ Created new User interface with professionalProfileIds[] and ownedPlaceIds[]
✅ Updated AuthContext to support both legacy and new systems
✅ Kept PlaceOwner interface for backward compatibility \(marked LEGACY\)
✅ All existing pages continue to work \(Settings, MyPlaces, PublicProfile, etc.\)

## Architecture:
- Legacy system: professional + placeOwner \(still functional\)
- New system: appUser + professionals[] + ownedPlaces[]
- 100% backward compatibility maintained

## Next Steps:
- Update Register to create User documents
- Load professional profiles and places in AuthContext
- Create unified Settings/About Me pages

🤖 Generated with Claude Code
https://claude.com/claude-code

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Phase 1 & 2 Complete: Unified Account System Implementation

COMPLETED:
✅ Updated register\(\) to create unified User documents
✅ Updated addRole\(\) to sync with User.professionalProfileIds
✅ Implemented automatic migration for existing users on login
✅ AuthContext now loads appUser, professionals[], and ownedPlaces[]
✅ Fixed TypeScript errors \(App.tsx, Settings.tsx, ProfileForm.tsx\)
✅ Added isCurrent and startDate fields to Workplace creation

NEW FEATURES:
- User documents created for all new registrations
- Automatic migration: old users get User documents created on login
- Legacy professional/placeOwner profiles are migrated to new system
- Backward compatibility maintained \(all existing pages work\)

CHANGES:
- AuthContext.tsx: Enhanced onAuthStateChanged with migration logic
- AuthContext.tsx: Updated register\(\) and addRole\(\) functions
- App.tsx: Fixed DashboardRouter to use professional/placeOwner checks
- Settings.tsx: Fixed userRole checks and added isCurrent field
- ProfileForm.tsx: Added isCurrent and startDate to new workplaces

NEXT STEPS \(from UNIFIED_SYSTEM_ROADMAP.md\):
- Phase 3: Create "About Me" page
- Phase 4: Create "Professional Profiles" page
- Phase 5: Create "Add/Edit Professional Profile" page

Generated with Claude Code
Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Phase 3 Complete: New About Me Page - Unified Account Overview

COMPLETED:
✅ Created comprehensive About Me page showing unified account view
✅ Displays personal information \(name, email, photo\)
✅ Shows all professional profiles in grid layout
✅ Displays all owned places with stats
✅ Added quick stats cards \(profiles count, places count, active locations\)
✅ Empty states for users without profiles or places
✅ Responsive design for mobile and desktop

NEW FEATURES:
- Personal Info Card: User avatar, name, email, phone with edit link
- Professional Profiles Section:
  - Grid of all professional profiles
  - Shows profile photo, name, category
  - Displays count of active workplaces
  - Link to create new professional profile
  - Empty state with call-to-action
- Owned Places Section:
  - Grid of all owned places
  - Shows place name, address, professionals count, rating
  - Link to add new places
  - Empty state with call-to-action
- Quick Stats Dashboard:
  - Total professional profiles
  - Total places managed
  - Total active workplace locations across all profiles

CHANGES:
- AboutMe.tsx: Complete rewrite from biography page to unified dashboard

UI/UX:
- Modern card-based layout
- Hover effects on profile and place cards
- Clear visual hierarchy
- Responsive grid layouts
- Empty states guide users to next actions

NEXT STEPS \(from UNIFIED_SYSTEM_ROADMAP.md\):
- Phase 4: Create "Professional Profiles" management page
- Phase 5: Create "Add/Edit Professional Profile" page
- Update existing Settings page structure

Generated with Claude Code
Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Phase 4 Complete: Professional Profiles Management Page

COMPLETED:
✅ Rewritten Professional Profiles page to use unified system
✅ Now pulls directly from professionals[] array in AuthContext
✅ Shows workplace summary with active vs previous workplaces
✅ Displays current workplaces with owner badges
✅ Added toggle active/inactive functionality for profiles
✅ Visual inactive state for deactivated profiles
✅ Improved card layout with workplace information
✅ Delete function now updates User.professionalProfileIds

NEW FEATURES:
- Workplaces Summary: Shows count of active vs previous workplaces
- Current Workplaces Display: Lists up to 2 current workplaces with owner badges
- Toggle Active/Inactive: Quick toggle button to enable/disable profiles
- Inactive Visual State: Dashed border and reduced opacity for inactive profiles
- Owner Badge: Purple badge shown for owned workplaces
- Auto-sync with User Document: Deletions update the unified User document

UI IMPROVEMENTS:
- Modern toggle switch \(ToggleRight/ToggleLeft icons\)
- Workplace counts with clear active/previous distinction
- Owner identification on workplace cards
- Responsive design maintained
- Better visual hierarchy

CHANGES:
- ProfessionalProfiles.tsx: Complete rewrite using unified system
- Uses professionals from AuthContext instead of querying Firestore
- handleDelete now removes profile ID from User document
- handleToggleActive added for quick enable/disable
- Workplace information prominently displayed

NEXT STEPS:
- Phase 5: Add workplace date UI to ProfileForm \(date pickers, currently working checkbox\)
- Phase 6: Transform Settings page into tabbed interface

Generated with Claude Code
Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
✅ COMPLETE: Simplified 2-Plan Pricing System Migration

DEPLOYMENT STATUS: Successfully deployed to production
URL: https://realrateme-731f1.web.app

## What Was Accomplished:

### 1. Database Migration ✅
- Deleted old 6-plan system \(professional/place categories\)
- Uploaded simplified 2-plan system \(FREE €0, PRO €49.99/year\)
- Created featureDefinitions collection with 21 features
- Fixed Firestore indexes \(removed invalid single-field index\)

### 2. Complete Page Rewrites ✅
- **Pricing.tsx**: Beautiful 2-column layout with feature comparison
- **Checkout.tsx**: User-based subscription flow
- **AdminPricing.tsx**: Simple 2-plan metadata editor
- **AdminFeatures.tsx**: Feature toggle interface \(21 features\)

### 3. Type System Overhaul ✅
- Removed PricingPlan.category field
- Changed features from array to object \(PlanFeatures\)
- Created FeatureDefinition interface
- All TypeScript errors fixed

### 4. Build & Deployment ✅
- Build passes with zero errors
- All functions deployed successfully
- Hosting deployed \(5 files\)
- Firestore rules & indexes updated

## New Features:

### Admin Panel:
- Toggle any of 21 features ON/OFF for FREE vs PRO plans
- Edit plan prices, names, descriptions
- Real-time updates to Firestore

### Public Pages:
- Pricing page with comprehensive feature comparison
- FAQ explaining unified account system
- Clear messaging: "One plan covers ALL activities"
- Shows limits clearly \(e.g., "Até 2" workplaces on FREE\)

### Feature Flags \(21 total\):
**Core:** publicProfile, receiveReviews, claimPlaces, displayProfessionals
**Limits:** workplaceLimit, profileLimit, placeLimit
**Analytics:** basicStats, advancedStats
**Marketing:** shareToSocial
**Customization:** customQuestions, customBranding, removeRealRateMeBranding
**Integration:** websiteWidget, googleReviewsIntegration, apiAccess
**Support:** prioritySupport
**Data:** exportData
**Content:** premiumPhotos, openingHours
**Advanced:** multipleLocations, teamManagement

## Key Architecture Changes:

1. **Unified Subscriptions**: One user plan covers all profiles and places
2. **Database-Driven Features**: Admin controls via Firestore \(no code deploy\)
3. **Type-Safe Features**: Object-based flags instead of arrays
4. **Simplified Pricing**: FREE vs PRO \(no more category confusion\)

## Files Changed:

### Created:
- src/pages/AdminFeatures.tsx \(Feature toggle UI\)
- firestore-seed-data/pricing-plans-simple.json
- firestore-seed-data/upload-simple-pricing.cjs
- PRICING_MIGRATION_COMPLETE.md \(comprehensive docs\)
- SIMPLIFIED_PRICING_STATUS.md
- MIGRATION_TODO.md

### Rewritten:
- src/pages/Pricing.tsx \(2-column comparison layout\)
- src/pages/Checkout.tsx \(user-based subscriptions\)
- src/pages/AdminPricing.tsx \(2-plan editor\)

### Updated:
- src/types/index.ts \(PricingPlan, PlanFeatures interfaces\)
- src/pages/Admin.tsx \(added Features tab\)
- firestore.indexes.json \(removed invalid index\)

## What''s NOT Done \(Future Work\):

⚠️  Plan enforcement NOT implemented \(no limits checked\)
⚠️  User.plan field not added yet
⚠️  Upgrade prompts NOT shown when hitting limits
⚠️  Most features defined but not built/enforced
⚠️  Payment functions may need updates

## Testing:

✅ Build successful
✅ Deployment successful
✅ All pages load correctly
✅ Admin panel accessible
✅ Feature toggles work
✅ No TypeScript errors
✅ All functions operational

🤖 Generated with Claude Code
https://claude.com/claude-code

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(echo "In the browser console on your Real Estate profile page, paste this and send me the output:

console.log\(''Workplaces:'', professional.workplaces.map\(w => \({
  name: w.name,
  hasPhotos: !!w.photos,
  photosLength: w.photos?.length || 0,
  firstPhoto: w.photos?.[0]
}\)\)\)")
